import transformers
import inspect
cls = transformers.models.qwen2_5_vl.modeling_qwen2_5_vl.Qwen2_5_VLModel
# get get_placeholder_mask
try:
    src = inspect.getsource\(cls.get_placeholder_mask\)
    print\(''=== get_placeholder_mask ===''\)
    print\(src[:3000]\)
except:
    print\(''get_placeholder_mask not found on Qwen2_5_VLModel''\)

# get get_image_features
try:
    src = inspect.getsource\(cls.get_image_features\)
    print\(''=== get_image_features ===''\)
    print\(src[:2000]\)
except:
    print\(''get_image_features not found''\)

# get get_video_features
try:
    src = inspect.getsource\(cls.get_video_features\)
    print\(''=== get_video_features \(original\) ===''\)
    print\(src[:2000]\)
except:
    print\(''get_video_features not found''\)
")

Bash(do python3 -c "
import json
d = json.load\(open\(''''$f''''\)\)
results = d.get\(''''results'''', {}\)
config = d.get\(''''config'''', {}\)
model_args = config.get\(''''model_args'''', ''''''''\)

tasks_found = []
for k in results:
    kl = k.lower\(\)
    if any\(t in kl for t in [''''gqa'''', ''''mme'''', ''''pope'''', ''''ocr'''']\):
        tasks_found.append\(k\)

if tasks_found:
    print\(''''FILE:'''', ''''$f''''\)
    print\(''''  model_args:'''', model_args[:250]\)
    for t in sorted\(tasks_found\):
        metrics = results[t]
        parts = []
        for mk, mv in sorted\(metrics.items\(\)\):
            if isinstance\(mv, \(int, float\)\):
                parts.append\(f''''{mk}={mv}''''\)
        print\(f''''  {t}: {chr\(10\).join\([  ] * 0\)}{chr\(44\).join\(parts\)}''''\)
    print\(\)
")
